chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2377 of 2020 C.P. No.D-8423 of 2019 _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGE(S) _________________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.10905/2020 2. For hearing of main case. 08.04.2025 Mr. Yousuf Ali, advocate for petitioner in both petitions Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent No.4 in CP D-8423/2019 Mr. Azad Hussain, advocate, holds brief for Mr. Khalid Rajper, advocate for respondent No.4 in CP D-2377/2020 Muhammad Nayyar Shafiq, Collector, Port Muhammad Bin Qasim, Karachi Zulfiqar Ali Syed, Commissioner IRS Zone-I, MTO, Karachi Pursuant to the last order, Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Syed, Commissioner IRS Zone-I, MTO, Karachi, is present. He states that the matter pertains to the advance tax of past fiscal years in respect whereof the annual returns have already been filed. He further states that any grievance with respect to the advance tax in the relevant period stands amalgamated in the annual return, therefore, no claim of the department in respect of any interlocutory deduction remains. The officer states that while the department remains at liberty to initiate any proceedings with respect to the final return, if warranted, no case remains so far as the advance tax for the periods concerned. Learned counsel for petitioner states that in view of the foregoing, petition appears to have served its purpose, the same may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Presence and assistance of officers is appreciated. Office is directed to place the copy hereof in the connected petition.
Presence and assistance of officers is appreciated. Office is directed to place the copy hereof in the connected petition. Judge Judge Gulsher/PS
